title: Learning Coach
status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Professional level Utah Preschool or Special Education License.Candidates who have successfully completed a minimum of 3 years general classroom teaching experience are preferred.  Must be a teacher in good standing with no documented performance or conduct concerns with in the past three years per WCSD policy 1120.3.1.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. To estimate possible step placement on the TT Salary Schedule, select following linkTT Step Placement Calculator.Attachment(s):TSA Learning Coach (Preschool) ADDENDUM.pdfTSA Learning Coach.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
